case_title: INTERNATIONAL FIRE, INC. et al VS FIRE SAFEGUARD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,314.50 FILED BY INTERNATIONAL FIRE, INC. SHERIDAN, ESTHER B. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRE SAFEGUARD RAGO, ROBERT MR. OWNER/BGR. FIREGUARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL FIRE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRE SAFEGUARD RAGO, ROBERT MR. OWNER/BGR. FIREGUARD $3,314.50 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,362.50, ESTHER B. SHERIDAN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. FIREGUARD IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ROBERT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT'S REQUEST TO VACATE OR CORRECT JUDGMENT FILED SUSPENCE DATE 11/16/00. NOTICED SENT TO DEFT. $14 FEES PAID.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIRE SAFEGUARD

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,487.00 FILED BY FIRE SAFEGUARD RAGO, ROBERT MR. OWNER/BGR. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL FIRE, INC. SHERIDAN, ESTHER B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL FIRE, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FIRE SAFEGUARD RAGO, ROBERT MR. OWNER/BGR. FIREGUARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL FIRE, INC. ESTHER B. SHERIDAN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OPPOSE TO REQUEST TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY FIRE SAFEGUARD.
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED: BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICED SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
